representative.name: filter_dist_comm'
representative.statement: theorem filter_dist_comm' (A : Finset ℝ²) (p : ℝ²) (r : ℝ) : A.filter (fun q => dist p q = r) = A.filter (fun q => dist q p = r)

representative.name: exists_injective_extension
representative.statement: theorem exists_injective_extension {n : ℕ} {S : Finset (Fin n)} {f : Fin n → Fin n} (hf : Set.InjOn f S) : ∃ σ : Fin n → Fin n, Function.Injective σ ∧ ∀ i ∈ S, σ i = f i

representative.name: pointPairClassCount_eq_countP
representative.statement: private theorem pointPairClassCount_eq_countP (shadow : Shadow) (x y : Label) : pointPairClassCount shadow x y = List.countP (fun center => pointPairHitByCenterMask center (shadow.centerMask center) (x, y)) allLabels

representative.name: assignedSeparationOK_of_isValidPinnedFragment
